display.purpose: Hero headline only. The single largest element on the page.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Centered in all sections except hero.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy, descriptions. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Nav links, category counts, uppercase tracking items.

mono.purpose: Terminal output, service metrics, legend text, category headers.

shadows.name: mac-window-shadow
shadows.purpose: Subtle drop shadow on terminal windows in Mac mode only.

shadows.name: host-detail-panel
shadows.purpose: Drop shadow on expanded host detail panels in live section.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for scroll reveals and entrance animations (300ms).

motion.name: ease-color-transition
motion.purpose: Color and background transitions on buttons and nav links (150ms).

motion.name: ease-crt-flicker
motion.purpose: Theme toggle CRT flash. Intentionally jarring to simulate power cycle.

components.name: CTA Button (Primary)
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Used for hero Get Started and GitHub Star buttons.
components.html: Get Started
components.css: .ds-cta-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; background: oklch(14% 0.008 65); color: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); font-family: 'Silkscreen', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-cta-btn:hover { background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); } .ds-cta-arrow { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; margin-left: 0.5rem; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-cta-btn { background: oklch(70% 0.07 170); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); } .ds-cta-btn:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); } }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost/outline button for secondary actions like Watch It Live.
components.html: Watch It Live
components.css: .ds-sec-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); font-family: 'Silkscreen', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-sec-btn:hover { background: oklch(95.5% 0.004 85); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-sec-btn { color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); border-color: oklch(34% 0.006 270); } .ds-sec-btn:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); } }

components.name: Icon Square (Medium)
components.description: 40px icon container used in feature items and nav logo.
components.css: .ds-icon-sq-md { width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); } .ds-icon-sq-md svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-icon-sq-md { background: oklch(70% 0.07 170); border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); } .ds-icon-sq-md svg { color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); } }

components.name: Accent Bar
components.description: Horizontal accent bar used as section heading underline.
components.css: .ds-accent-bar { width: 3rem; height: 0.25rem; background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); margin: 0 auto 2rem; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-accent-bar { background: oklch(70% 0.07 170); } }

components.name: Terminal Window
components.description: Signature terminal component with title bar, typewriter text, and blinking cursor.
components.html:
terminal

$ rezusctl init

Cluster ready.

$ _
components.css: .ds-terminal { background: oklch(6% 0.005 270); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 oklch(14% 0.008 65); } .ds-terminal-titlebar { background: repeating-linear-gradient(-45deg, oklch(82% 0.004 85) 0 2px, oklch(92% 0.004 85) 2px 4px); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); } .ds-terminal-dot { width: 0.625rem; height: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.008 65); } .ds-terminal-title { margin-left: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); font-family: 'Silkscreen', system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-terminal-body { padding: 1rem; font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); line-height: 1.5; } .ds-terminal-prompt { color: oklch(78% 0.16 75); } .ds-terminal-cursor { animation: blink 1s step-end infinite; } .ds-terminal-line { margin: 0.25rem 0; } @keyframes blink { 0%, 49% { opacity: 1; } 50%, 100% { opacity: 0; } } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-terminal { border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270); box-shadow: none; } .ds-terminal-titlebar { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); border-bottom: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); } .ds-terminal-dot { display: none; } .ds-terminal-prompt { color: oklch(60% 0.08 170); } }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Desktop navigation link with active pill state.
components.html: HomeFeatures
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; font-family: 'Silkscreen', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; color: oklch(30% 0.008 65); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.12s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(95.5% 0.004 85); } .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-nav-link { color: oklch(72% 0.012 85); } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); } .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(58% 0.006 270); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); } }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: 40x40px theme switcher with moon/sun icons and CRT flash on toggle.
components.html: <button class="ds-theme-toggle" aria-label="Toggle theme"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M20.354 15.354A9 9 0 018.646 3.646 9.003 9.003 0 0012 21a9.003 9.003 0 008.354-5.646z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle { width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; padding: 0; } .ds-theme-toggle svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; color: oklch(30% 0.008 65); } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { background: oklch(95.5% 0.004 85); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-theme-toggle { border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); background: oklch(20% 0.006 270); } .ds-theme-toggle svg { color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); } }

components.name: Service Box
components.description: Compact metric box in live section. Shows status dot + CPU cores + RAM.
components.css: .ds-svc-box { width: 100%; text-align: left; padding: 0.25rem 0.375rem; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65 / 0.25); background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); line-height: 1; min-width: 5.625rem; } .ds-svc-box:hover { border-color: oklch(78% 0.16 75 / 0.6); } .ds-svc-dot { width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-svc-healthy { background: oklch(62.7% 0.194 149.214); } .ds-svc-metric { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-svc-box { border-color: oklch(34% 0.006 270 / 0.7); background: oklch(20% 0.006 270); color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); } .ds-svc-box:hover { border-color: oklch(60% 0.08 170 / 0.6); } .ds-svc-healthy { background: oklch(72.3% 0.219 149.579); } }

narrative.overview:
Two operating systems, one machine. Light mode is a 1984 Macintosh 128K: bitmap fonts, 1px borders, stark contrast, amber highlights on warm white. Dark mode is a 1988 NeXTcube: 3D beveled edges, CRT scanlines, phosphor afterglow, muted teal on deep black. The site is not decorated to look retro. It IS retro, running natively in the browser.

The system is defiant, precise, and nostalgic. Every element earns its place. No rounded corners, no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no SaaS hero-metric template, no identical card grids. The layout principle is flat: text flows without container boxes, spacing varies for rhythm, and section backgrounds alternate between two surface levels.
keyCharacteristics: Zero border-radius everywhere. Every corner is a right angle.
Dual-era identity: Mac System 1 in light, NeXTSTEP in dark. Fonts stay the same, only colors change.
Committed color strategy: amber gold (light) / teal (dark) carry the accent load across 30-40% of visible surface.
Flat text layout: no boxes wrapping content, no bordered cards. Icon squares, dots, and accent bars punctuate.
3D bevel system for NeXT mode: 2px raised/sunken borders on interactive elements.
5 sections: Hero, Architecture, Live Platform, Features, Get Started.
Progressive disclosure: Live section categories collapsed by default, expand on click.

rules.name: The Dual-Accent Rule
rules.body: Light mode uses amber gold. Dark mode uses teal. Never mix: amber never appears in dark mode, teal never appears in light mode. Each accent occupies the same structural positions in both modes.

rules.name: The Alternating Rhythm Rule
rules.body: Sections alternate between two background levels. Light: paper/surface/surface-strong. Dark: next-black/next-dark. This rhythm never breaks.

rules.name: The No-Gray-Accent Rule
rules.body: In NeXT mode, next-light is a bright neutral for UI chrome (active nav pills only). It is never used for accent purposes. That role belongs exclusively to next-teal.

rules.name: The No-Serif Rule
rules.body: Serif fonts never appear. The system is entirely sans-serif + bitmap + mono.

rules.name: The Font-Consistency Rule
rules.body: Font families are identical between light and dark modes. Only colors change. Silkscreen always for display/labels, system-ui always for body, VT323 always for terminals.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Mode Rule
rules.body: Mac mode is always flat: borders are always 1px solid ink. NeXT mode uses bevels: borders are always 2px with directional shading. Never mix bevel styles within a mode.

dos: Do use zero border-radius on every element. Every corner is a right angle. This is non-negotiable.
Do use Silkscreen for all headings, labels, and nav. system-ui for body. VT323 for terminals only.

Do alternate section backgrounds. The pattern is: hero (paper/next-black), architecture (surface/next-dark), live (surface-strong/next-black), features (paper/next-black), getstarted (paper/next-black).
Do use amber gold (light) / teal (dark) as the exclusive accent. One accent per mode, same structural positions.
Do use 2px bevels in NeXT mode for interactive elements. They are the elevation system.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. All animations must have a static fallback.
Do vary section padding for rhythm. pt-20/py-16 (hero), py-16 (architecture, live), py-20 (features), py-12 (getstarted).
Do collapse live section categories by default. Progressive disclosure reduces cognitive load.
Do add THIS SITE label to the self-referencing service box. It proves the dogfooding story.
Do provide actionable CTAs. GitHub star button and Watch It Live link, not Coming soon placeholders.
donts: Don't use rounded corners anywhere. No rounded-* classes. No border-radius in CSS.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Solid colors only.
Don't use glassmorphism. No blur overlays, no frosted glass cards.
Don't wrap text in bordered container boxes. Layout is flat.
Don't mix accent colors between modes. Amber never in dark, teal never in light.
Don't use #000 or #fff. All neutrals are tinted with brand hue. Minimum chroma 0.004.
Don't use next-light as an accent color. It is a bright neutral for active nav pills only.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Animate opacity and transform only.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring easings. Use ease-out-quart or exponential curves.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't show all 65 service boxes at once. Use progressive disclosure with collapsible categories.
Don't use Coming soon as the only CTA. Always provide at least one actionable next step.
